requirement_topic.en: Turkey F-Gas Regulation — HFC Refrigerant Controls and Quota System
requirement_topic.zh: 土耳其F-Gas法规——HFC制冷剂管控与配额制度
requirement_topic.zht: 土耳其F-Gas法規——HFC製冷劑管控與配額制度

summary.en: Turkey has adopted an F-Gas Regulation aligned to EU Regulation 517/2014, administered by the Ministry of Environment and Urbanisation (ÇEVRE). The regulation imposes HFC quota restrictions on producers, importers, and equipment manufacturers. R-22 is banned (HCFC phaseout completed). HFC refrigerants (R-32, R-410A, R-134a) are permitted but subject to quota allocation. Equipment containing F-gases must be labelled with the refrigerant type, GWP value, and charge quantity. Installers and service technicians handling F-gas equipment must hold certificates issued by TÜRKAK-accredited bodies. Leak detection requirements apply to larger systems.
summary.zh: 土耳其已采用与欧盟法规517/2014对齐的F-Gas法规，由环境和城市化部（ÇEVRE）执行。该法规对生产商、进口商和设备制造商施加HFC配额限制。R-22已禁用（HCFC淘汰完成）。HFC制冷剂（R-32、R-410A、R-134a）允许使用，但须受配额分配限制。含F-Gas设备须标注制冷剂类型、GWP值和充注量。处理F-Gas设备的安装人员和维修技术人员须持有TÜRKAK认可机构颁发的资质证书。较大系统须符合泄漏检测要求。
summary.zht: 土耳其已採用與歐盟法規517/2014對齊的F-Gas法規，由環境和城市化部（ÇEVRE）執行。該法規對生產商、進口商和設備製造商施加HFC配額限制。R-22已禁用（HCFC淘汰完成）。HFC製冷劑（R-32、R-410A、R-134a）允許使用，但須受配額分配限制。含F-Gas設備須標注製冷劑類型、GWP值和充注量。處理F-Gas設備的安裝人員和維修技術人員須持有TÜRKAK認可機構頒發的資質證書。較大系統須符合洩漏檢測要求。

standards_or_laws: Turkey F-Gas Regulation aligned to EU Regulation No 517/2014
ÇEVRE (Ministry of Environment and Urbanisation) implementing regulations
TÜRKAK accreditation for F-gas technician certification bodies

summary.en: China follows the Montreal Protocol HCFC phaseout schedule under SEPA / MEE regulations. R-22 is being phased out for new equipment under China's HCFC phaseout plan. China does not operate an HFC quota system equivalent to EU/Turkey F-Gas Regulation 517/2014. Chinese products exported with R-32 or R-410A refrigerants do not carry GWP labelling or F-Gas compliance documentation in the EU/Turkey format. GB 9237 sets refrigerant safety requirements for Chinese domestic products.
summary.zh: 中国依据SEPA / 生态环境部法规遵循《蒙特利尔议定书》HCFC淘汰时间表。R-22在中国HCFC淘汰计划下正对新设备逐步淘汰。中国未实施与欧盟/土耳其F-Gas法规517/2014等效的HFC配额制度。以R-32或R-410A制冷剂出口的中国产品不附带欧盟/土耳其格式的GWP标注或F-Gas合规文件。GB 9237规定了中国内销产品的制冷剂安全要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據SEPA / 生態環境部法規遵循《蒙特利爾議定書》HCFC淘汰時間表。R-22在中國HCFC淘汰計劃下正對新設備逐步淘汰。中國未實施與歐盟/土耳其F-Gas法規517/2014等效的HFC配額制度。以R-32或R-410A製冷劑出口的中國產品不附帶歐盟/土耳其格式的GWP標注或F-Gas合規文件。GB 9237規定了中國內銷產品的製冷劑安全要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 — Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — Safety and environmental requirements
MEE (Ministry of Ecology and Environment) ODS regulations

gap.en: Chinese exported heat pumps do not include GWP labelling or F-Gas compliance documentation in the Turkish/EU format. Exporters must: (1) ensure the refrigerant used is permitted under Turkey's F-Gas quota system; (2) add refrigerant type, GWP, and charge quantity labelling to the product in Turkish; (3) confirm importer compliance with HFC quota allocation; and (4) ensure downstream installers hold TÜRKAK-recognised F-Gas handling certificates. R-32 (GWP 675) and R-410A (GWP 2088) are permitted but subject to quota — R-410A faces phase-down pressure under the HFC quota trajectory.
gap.zh: 中国出口热泵不附带土耳其/欧盟格式的GWP标注或F-Gas合规文件。出口商须：(1) 确保所用制冷剂在土耳其F-Gas配额制度下获准使用；(2) 在产品上添加土耳其语的制冷剂类型、GWP和充注量标注；(3) 确认进口商符合HFC配额分配要求；(4) 确保下游安装人员持有TÜRKAK认可的F-Gas操作资质证书。R-32（GWP 675）和R-410A（GWP 2088）获准使用但受配额约束——R-410A在HFC配额削减轨道下面临逐步淘汰压力。
gap.zht: 中國出口熱泵不附帶土耳其/歐盟格式的GWP標注或F-Gas合規文件。出口商須：(1) 確保所用製冷劑在土耳其F-Gas配額制度下獲准使用；(2) 在產品上添加土耳其語的製冷劑類型、GWP和充注量標注；(3) 確認進口商符合HFC配額分配要求；(4) 確保下游安裝人員持有TÜRKAK認可的F-Gas操作資質證書。R-32（GWP 675）和R-410A（GWP 2088）獲准使用但受配額約束——R-410A在HFC配額削減軌道下面臨逐步淘汰壓力。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — F-Gas labelling, GWP disclosure, and quota compliance required; R-22 banned
mandatory_status.cn: China HCFC phaseout rules mandatory; no equivalent HFC quota labelling obligation for domestic market

source.publisher: Republic of Turkey Ministry of Environment, Urbanisation and Climate Change (ÇEVRE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — Turkish F-Gas Regulation requires GWP labelling, refrigerant charge disclosure, HFC quota compliance, and TÜRKAK-certified installers. Chinese products must be re-labelled and importers must confirm quota eligibility before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——土耳其F-Gas法规要求GWP标注、制冷剂充注量披露、HFC配额合规及TÜRKAK认证安装人员。中国产品须重新标注，进口商须在市场投放前确认配额资质。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——土耳其F-Gas法規要求GWP標注、製冷劑充注量披露、HFC配額合規及TÜRKAK認證安裝人員。中國產品須重新標注，進口商須在市場投放前確認配額資質。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Safety Standards — EN 378 vs GB 9237 Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂安全标准——EN 378与GB 9237的对齐
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑安全標準——EN 378與GB 9237的對齊

summary.en: Turkey requires heat pump refrigerant safety compliance under EN 378 (Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — Safety and environmental requirements), consistent with EU practice. EN 378 covers refrigerant classification, charge limits, safety relief, machinery room requirements (where applicable), and marking. CE marking under the applicable directives incorporates EN 378 as a referenced harmonised standard. Refrigerant classification under EN 378 / ISO 817 (safety groups A1, A2L, B2L, etc.) must be documented and referenced in the technical file.
summary.zh: 土耳其要求热泵制冷剂安全按EN 378（制冷系统和热泵——安全和环境要求）合规，与欧盟做法一致。EN 378涵盖制冷剂分类、充注量限制、安全泄压、机房要求（适用时）和标识。相关指令下的CE标志将EN 378作为引用的协调标准。技术文件须记录并引用EN 378 / ISO 817下的制冷剂分类（安全组别A1、A2L、B2L等）。
summary.zht: 土耳其要求熱泵製冷劑安全按EN 378（製冷系統和熱泵——安全和環境要求）合規，與歐盟做法一致。EN 378涵蓋製冷劑分類、充注量限制、安全洩壓、機房要求（適用時）和標識。相關指令下的CE標誌將EN 378作為引用的協調標準。技術文件須記錄並引用EN 378 / ISO 817下的製冷劑分類（安全組別A1、A2L、B2L等）。

standards_or_laws: EN 378-1/2/3/4 — Refrigerating systems and heat pumps (Safety and environmental requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification
CE Machinery Directive technical file requirements

summary.en: China uses GB 9237 (equivalent to an older ISO 5149 baseline) for refrigerant safety in heat pumps and refrigerating systems. GB 9237 covers similar ground to EN 378 but with differing charge limits, classification references, and documentation requirements. Chinese products are not tested or documented to EN 378, and the technical file prepared for CCC does not map directly to EN 378 CE technical file requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对热泵和制冷系统的制冷剂安全采用GB 9237（相当于较旧ISO 5149基准）。GB 9237涵盖与EN 378类似的内容，但充注量限制、分类依据和文件要求存在差异。中国产品未按EN 378测试或记录，为CCC准备的技术文件不能直接映射至EN 378 CE技术文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國對熱泵和製冷系統的製冷劑安全採用GB 9237（相當於較舊ISO 5149基準）。GB 9237涵蓋與EN 378類似的內容，但充注量限制、分類依據和文件要求存在差異。中國產品未按EN 378測試或記錄，為CCC準備的技術文件不能直接映射至EN 378 CE技術文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 — Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — Safety and environmental requirements

gap.en: EN 378 compliance documentation must be prepared separately from GB 9237. Key differences include: refrigerant classification per ISO 817 vs Chinese GB classification; charge limit calculations per EN 378 room-size rules; and technical file structure. For A2L refrigerants (e.g. R-32), additional EN 378 Part 2 safety provisions apply. Exporters should have the CE technical file explicitly reference EN 378 parts and confirm charge limits and classification under the EN system.
gap.zh: EN 378合规文件须独立于GB 9237另行准备。主要差异包括：按ISO 817的制冷剂分类（对比中国GB分类）、按EN 378房间尺寸规则计算的充注量限制，以及技术文件结构。对于A2L制冷剂（如R-32），须额外符合EN 378第2部分安全条款。出口商应在CE技术文件中明确引用EN 378各部分，并确认EN体系下的充注量限制和分类。
gap.zht: EN 378合規文件須獨立於GB 9237另行準備。主要差異包括：按ISO 817的製冷劑分類（對比中國GB分類）、按EN 378房間尺寸規則計算的充注量限制，以及技術文件結構。對於A2L製冷劑（如R-32），須額外符合EN 378第2部分安全條款。出口商應在CE技術文件中明確引用EN 378各部分，並確認EN體系下的充注量限制和分類。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 378 compliance is required as part of CE marking technical file for heat pumps in Turkey
mandatory_status.cn: GB 9237 mandatory for China domestic market; not sufficient for Turkey CE technical file

source.publisher: CEN (European Committee for Standardization) — EN 378 series

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — EN 378 refrigerant safety documentation must be prepared independently of GB 9237. Charge limit calculations, ISO 817 classification, and technical file structure must align to EN 378 requirements before CE marking.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——EN 378制冷剂安全文件须独立于GB 9237另行准备。充注量计算、ISO 817分类和技术文件结构须在取得CE标志前符合EN 378要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——EN 378製冷劑安全文件須獨立於GB 9237另行準備。充注量計算、ISO 817分類和技術文件結構須在取得CE標誌前符合EN 378要求。
